requirement_topic.en: Pressure Equipment Directive — Refrigerant Circuit Classification (PED 2014/68/EU)
requirement_topic.zh: 压力设备指令——制冷剂回路分类（PED 2014/68/EU）
requirement_topic.zht: 壓力設備指令——制冷劑迴路分類（PED 2014/68/EU）

summary.en: Spain applies Pressure Equipment Directive 2014/68/EU directly as an EU member state. The PED applies to heat pump refrigerant circuits as pressure equipment. Classification depends on fluid group (Group 1 = flammable or toxic refrigerants such as R290; Group 2 = non-flammable, non-toxic refrigerants such as R32 and R410A), maximum allowable pressure, and volume. Category I (lowest risk) allows manufacturer self-declaration; Categories II, III, and IV require involvement of a Notified Body (NB). EN 378 also applies for system-level refrigerating system safety. In Spain, UNE/AENOR publishes the Spanish-language adoptions (UNE-EN 378 series). Spanish installations are further subject to the RITE building code, which imposes additional documentation and commissioning requirements for thermal installations.
summary.zh: 西班牙作为欧盟成员国直接适用压力设备指令2014/68/EU（PED）。PED将热泵制冷剂回路视为压力设备加以管理。分类取决于流体组别（第1组=可燃或有毒制冷剂，如R290；第2组=不可燃、无毒制冷剂，如R32和R410A）、最高许用压力及容积。第I类（最低风险）允许制造商自我声明；第II类、第III类和第IV类须引入公告机构（NB）。EN 378同样适用于系统级制冷系统安全。在西班牙，UNE/AENOR发布西班牙语版本（UNE-EN 378系列）。西班牙安装还须遵守RITE建筑法规，该法规对热工安装规定了额外的文件和调试要求。
summary.zht: 西班牙作為歐盟成員國直接適用壓力設備指令2014/68/EU（PED）。PED將熱泵制冷劑迴路視為壓力設備加以管理。分類取決於流體組別（第1組=可燃或有毒制冷劑，如R290；第2組=不可燃、無毒制冷劑，如R32和R410A）、最高許用壓力及容積。第I類（最低風險）允許製造商自我聲明；第II類、第III類和第IV類須引入公告機構（NB）。EN 378同樣適用於系統級制冷系統安全。在西班牙，UNE/AENOR發布西班牙語版本（UNE-EN 378系列）。西班牙安裝還須遵守RITE建築法規，該法規對熱工安裝規定了額外的文件和調試要求。

standards_or_laws: RITE — Reglamento de Instalaciones Térmicas en los Edificios (Spain)

summary.en: TSG 21-2016 (Special Equipment Safety Technical Supervision Regulations for Boilers and Pressure Vessels, administered by SAMR) and GB 150.1-150.4-2011 (Pressure vessels) govern pressure vessels in China. SELO (Special Equipment Licensing Office) registration is required for certain pressure vessels. The Chinese risk classification methodology differs from PED: different boundary conditions, different inspection body roles, and SELO registration is not a CE marking equivalent. The Chinese framework does not include building-code-level installation obligations equivalent to the Spanish RITE.
summary.zh: TSG 21-2016（由市监总局管理的锅炉和压力容器安全技术监察规程）和GB 150.1-150.4-2011（压力容器）管辖中国境内的压力容器。特定压力容器须向特种设备许可机构（SELO）进行注册。中国风险分类方法与PED不同：边界条件不同、检验机构职能不同，SELO注册并非CE标志的等效证明。中国框架不包括与西班牙RITE同等的建筑法规层面安装义务。
summary.zht: TSG 21-2016（由市監總局管理的鍋爐和壓力容器安全技術監察規程）和GB 150.1-150.4-2011（壓力容器）管轄中國境內的壓力容器。特定壓力容器須向特種設備許可機構（SELO）進行登記。中國風險分類方法與PED不同：邊界條件不同、檢驗機構職能不同，SELO登記並非CE標誌的等效證明。中國框架不包括與西班牙RITE同等的建築法規層面安裝義務。

gap.en: PED classification and Notified Body requirements differ substantially from the Chinese SELO/TSG system. Chinese pressure vessel approvals (TSG/SELO certificates) are not recognised under PED. For heat pump circuits classified as PED Category II or higher, a Notified Body must be engaged. Additionally, Spanish RITE compliance requires Spanish-language installation documentation and certification by an authorised installer (instalador autorizado), which has no equivalent in the Chinese export documentation framework.
gap.zh: PED分类和公告机构要求与中国SELO/TSG体系存在实质性差异。在中国取得的压力容器批准（TSG/SELO证书）在PED下不被认可。对于被分类为PED第II类或更高类别的热泵回路，须引入公告机构。此外，西班牙RITE合规要求提供西班牙语安装文件并由授权安装方（instalador autorizado）进行认证，中国出口文件框架中没有类似要求。
gap.zht: PED分類和公告機構要求與中國SELO/TSG體系存在實質性差異。在中國取得的壓力容器批准（TSG/SELO證書）在PED下不被認可。對於被分類為PED第II類或更高類別的熱泵迴路，須引入公告機構。此外，西班牙RITE合規要求提供西班牙語安裝文件並由授權安裝方（instalador autorizado）進行認證，中國出口文件框架中沒有類似要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (PED applies to refrigerant circuits meeting pressure/volume thresholds; RITE applies to Spanish building installations)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (TSG 21/SELO registration for applicable pressure vessels)

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Major gap — PED classification and Notified Body requirements differ substantially from Chinese SELO/TSG system; existing Chinese pressure vessel approvals not recognised under PED; Spanish RITE installation obligations add further local requirements.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 重大差距——PED分类和公告机构要求与中国SELO/TSG体系存在实质性差异；现有中国压力容器批准在PED下不被认可；西班牙RITE安装义务增加了额外的本地要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 重大差距——PED分類和公告機構要求與中國SELO/TSG體系存在實質性差異；現有中國壓力容器批准在PED下不被認可；西班牙RITE安裝義務增加了額外的本地要求。

requirement_topic.en: Refrigerant Circuit Safety — EN 378 System Safety Requirements (Spain)
requirement_topic.zh: 制冷剂回路安全——EN 378系统安全要求（西班牙）
requirement_topic.zht: 制冷劑迴路安全——EN 378系統安全要求（西班牙）

summary.en: Pressure Equipment Directive 2014/68/EU is the mandatory legal framework for refrigerant circuits that meet its pressure, volume, and fluid-group thresholds. EN 378-1:2016+A1:2020 through EN 378-4:2016 are voluntary harmonised standards for refrigerating systems and heat pumps; applying them can support a presumption of conformity with relevant EU essential requirements, but the standards themselves are not mandatory. In Spain, UNE/AENOR publishes UNE-EN 378 adoptions in Spanish, and installers operating under RITE must ensure that installed systems comply with applicable safety standards and that installation records meet the RITE documentation requirements.
summary.zh: 压力设备指令2014/68/EU是适用于达到其压力、容积和流体组别阈值的制冷剂回路的强制性法律框架。EN 378-1:2016+A1:2020至EN 378-4:2016是制冷系统和热泵的自愿协调标准；采用这些标准可支持对相关欧盟基本要求的符合性推定，但标准本身并非强制。在西班牙，UNE/AENOR以西班牙语发布UNE-EN 378采标版本，在RITE框架下运营的安装方须确保所安装系统符合适用安全标准，且安装记录满足RITE文件要求。
summary.zht: 壓力設備指令2014/68/EU是適用於達到其壓力、容積和流體組別閾值的制冷劑迴路的強制性法律框架。EN 378-1:2016+A1:2020至EN 378-4:2016是制冷系統和熱泵的自願協調標準；採用這些標準可支持對相關歐盟基本要求的符合性推定，但標準本身並非強制。在西班牙，UNE/AENOR以西班牙語發布UNE-EN 378採標版本，在RITE框架下運營的安裝方須確保所安裝系統符合適用安全標準，且安裝記錄滿足RITE文件要求。

standards_or_laws: RITE — Reglamento de Instalaciones Térmicas en los Edificios (Spain)

summary.en: GB 9237-2008 (Safety requirements for refrigerating systems) is China's national adoption of ISO 5149:1993. The current revision status of GB/T 9237 should be verified at time of compliance assessment. Charge limits for flammable refrigerants in indoor environments, room ventilation thresholds, and system documentation requirements differ from EN 378. GB 9237 does not cover the same scope of leak detection obligations as EN 378, and there is no Chinese equivalent to the Spanish RITE installation documentation and commissioning certification regime.
summary.zh: GB 9237-2008（制冷系统安全要求）是中国对ISO 5149:1993的国家采标。GB/T 9237的当前修订状态应在合规评估时予以核查。室内可燃制冷剂充注量限制、房间通风阈值和系统文件要求与EN 378不同。GB 9237未涵盖与EN 378同等范围的泄漏检测义务，也没有与西班牙RITE安装文件和调试认证制度相当的中国等效规定。
summary.zht: GB 9237-2008（制冷系統安全要求）是中國對ISO 5149:1993的國家採標。GB/T 9237的當前修訂狀態應在合規評估時予以核查。室內可燃制冷劑充注量限制、房間通風閾值和系統文件要求與EN 378不同。GB 9237未涵蓋與EN 378同等範圍的洩漏檢測義務，也沒有與西班牙RITE安裝文件和調試認證制度相當的中國等效規定。

gap.en: EU legal compliance must be assessed against PED where the refrigerant circuit falls within PED scope. EN 378 documentation, leak detection, and flammable refrigerant charge-limit methods differ from GB 9237. Spanish RITE additionally requires installation documentation in Spanish, commissioning by a registered instalador autorizado, and ongoing maintenance records. None of these RITE obligations are covered by Chinese export documentation.
gap.zh: 若制冷剂回路落入PED范围，欧盟法律合规性必须按PED评估。EN 378的文件、泄漏检测和可燃制冷剂充注量限制方法与GB 9237不同。西班牙RITE还额外要求以西班牙语提供安装文件、由注册的instalador autorizado进行调试，以及保存持续维护记录。这些RITE义务均未涵盖在中国出口文件中。
gap.zht: 若制冷劑迴路落入PED範圍，歐盟法律合規性必須按PED評估。EN 378的文件、洩漏檢測和可燃制冷劑充注量限制方法與GB 9237不同。西班牙RITE還額外要求以西班牙語提供安裝文件、由登記的instalador autorizado進行調試，以及保存持續維護記錄。這些RITE義務均未涵蓋在中國出口文件中。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation: PED applies where pressure/volume/fluid-group thresholds are met; RITE applies to Spanish building installations; EN 378 is voluntary and may confer presumption of conformity
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (GB 9237 under fire safety and product safety regime)

source.publisher: IDAE — Instituto para la Diversificación y Ahorro de la Energía

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Gap — PED applicability must be classified first; EN 378 is a voluntary harmonised route to presumption of conformity and differs from GB 9237; Spanish RITE imposes additional installation documentation, commissioning, and maintenance obligations with no Chinese export equivalent.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 存在差距——须先判定PED适用性；EN 378是取得符合性推定的自愿协调标准，且与GB 9237不同；西班牙RITE增加了安装文件、调试和维护义务，中国出口文件无对应内容。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 存在差距——須先判定PED適用性；EN 378是取得符合性推定的自願協調標準，且與GB 9237不同；西班牙RITE增加了安裝文件、調試和維護義務，中國出口文件無對應內容。
